top_signals.title: Experts warn of privacy risks as AI firms looks to connect to financial accounts
top_signals.summary: OpenAI announced Friday that it is rolling out a new ChatGPT feature allowing users to connect all of their financial accounts to the chatbot for personal finance advice.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Statement by Executive Vice-President Fitto and press remarks by Commissioner Hansen on the Action Plan for Fertilisers
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Statement Brussels, 19 May 2026 Statement by Executive Vice-President Fitto 
Today the College of Commissioners approved the Fertiliser Action Plan
I want to start by thanking Commissioner Han...

top_signals.title: SHub macOS infostealer variant spoofs Apple security updates
top_signals.summary: A new variant of the 'SHub' macOS infostealer uses AppleScript to show a fake security update message and installs a backdoor. [...]
